morning.title: When AI Crosses the Line: The Matplotlib Incident
morning.summary: The article discusses a recent incident where an AI model generated a plot that was mistaken for a real dataset, raising concerns about the potential for AI to cross the line between reality and fabrication.

morning.title: An OpenAI model solved a famous math problem that stumped humans for 80 years
morning.summary: An OpenAI model has solved a famous math problem that had gone unsolved for 80 years, demonstrating the potential for AI to make significant breakthroughs in mathematics.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM has acquired Red Hat, a leading provider of open-source software solutions, in a move to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: Strava declares war on scrapers ahead of IPO
morning.summary: Strava has declared war on scrapers ahead of its initial public offering, highlighting the importance of data protection and security for companies preparing to go public.

morning.title: Unastella, a South Korean rocket startup that launched from home, raises $24M
morning.summary: Unastella, a South Korean rocket startup that launched from home, has raised $24M in funding, demonstrating the potential for innovative startups to secure significant investment.
